title: Hamter's Decor
description: Decor mod adding lots of customization and blocks.
body:
## Hamter's Decor

A mod that adds a bunch of decorative blocks ranging from simple bricks to large fans.

Currently in Beta with 500+ blocks to build with laid out here:
- Various Bars
- Colored Tiles
- all sorts of different stones
- Redwood Planks
- Custom sliding doors
- More glass
- Fans and airducts

Note that this mod does not (yet) include recipes for survival friendly building!
I have since added alot of recipes in both new versions.

I have fixed the dependencies not working and downloading the wrong one lol
